creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 193378
patch file

Change dependecy from www/p5-CGI.pm to www/p5-CGI because

* www/p5-CGI and www/p5-CGI.pm provide same functions and conflict each other.
* While a lot of ports use www/p5-CGI, only this one uses www/p5-CGI.pm.
* By swiching to use www/p5-CGI this port and others can be installed together.
